name: Screen Golf Masters
about: Screen Golf Masters is a family-owned local virtual golf lounge offering state-of-the-art simulators with affordable pricing. The venue features a main lounge for social play and a separate driving range for quiet practice, creating a customizable experience for different preferences. During winter months, operating hours are 10AM-9PM Monday-Saturday and 10AM-6PM Sunday. The venue emphasizes a relaxing, welcoming atmosphere suitable for both casual and serious golfers, with an emphasis on transforming the space for an enhanced customer experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Separate driving range and main lounge for different experience preferences
Affordable pricing with package deals and membership options
Professional golf lessons available with PGA and US-GTF certified instructors
Versatile facility suitable for both practice and social play

food_and_drink.notes: Food available through pre-order from a deli partner
No mention of alcohol service on premises

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Not specified, but typical for golf simulators to use your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food can be pre-ordered from their deli partner. No mention of BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not specified, but this typically varies depending on simulator setup and number of players.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Screen Golf Masters is described as a family-friendly venue with separate areas for different experience preferences.
